text:
is a fictional character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. He first appears in the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. He is the father of Hikari Horaki, Kodama Horaki, and Nozomi Horaki. He is also the grandfather of Tsubame Suzuhara.

Appearance

History

Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time

Bunzaemon arrives home in the evening to have dinner with his family, with Shinji present as their guest. He berates Shinji for his unresponsivness towards his family's hospitality.
